name: hyperion
description: Dan Simmons' Hyperion — a landmark science fiction novel of seven pilgrims, each telling their story on a journey to the Time Tombs and the mysterious Shrike.
useCase: Understanding through storytelling, facing the unknown, love and loss, faith and doubt, the weight of choices, transformation through pilgrimage.
knownRisks: Hyperion is the first book of an unfinished series — some threads resolve in The Fall of Hyperion
The novel's non-linear structure can be challenging
The Shrike and the Time Tombs are not fully explained in this volume
